transcript.content: 你在 Codex 里验证，别先看单测，先看这 3 组结果。 **1. 看默认诊断有没有变轻** 在仓库根目录跑：
能，我已经自己测了，而且能测的我基本都测了。 我已经验证了这几项：

能，而且我已经把这个功能做出来并自己测过了。 你现在在 Codex 里可以直接用这 3 个命令：
需要做成，我点击状态栏工具，直接能够在显示的方法； 并且能够持续展示变化；而不需要我经常刷新； 可以打开一个编辑器来展示这些内容，也可以在terminal里展示，甚至是tail的方式，但是要自动； 而不是我要手动输入什么指令；
我已经把“可视化 context 大小”这层先做出来了，仓库侧现在有两个可直接接入的展示面： 1. 固定面板文件 路径： [live-panel.md](/Users/redcreen/Project/unified-memory-core/reports/generated/codex-vscode-context-minor-gc/live-panel.md)
已经接上了。 我改了两层：
为什么 和 Project Assistant 有关系？
因为我刚才找到并能直接修改的“状态栏宿主代码”，不是 OpenAI 官方 Codex 扩展本体，而是你本机装的这个扩展： - `~/.codex/skills/project-assistant/integrations/vscode-host/extension.js`
单独做，不要碰assitant 要有边界；

decision.archive_summary: Active task remains the Codex context-size visibility feature in VS Code, but with a new hard boundary: implement it separately and do not modify or rely on Project Assistant. Preserve the product requirement that context usage should be directly visible from the status-bar flow and update automatically without manual refresh/commands; acceptable surfaces include an editor, terminal, or tail-style live view. Older validation chatter and the already-done assistant-coupled implementation can leave the next-turn raw prompt.
decision.reasoning_summary: The latest user turn is a constraint update on the same feature request, so this stays on the same active topic. Early turns about testing and manual commands are superseded by the later UX requirement. Turns describing the already-implemented assistant-coupled solution are now mostly obsolete after the user's boundary correction, so they are strong eviction candidates. The core durable requirements to preserve are the auto-updating visibility requirement and the boundary rule to keep Codex work separate from Project Assistant.
